releaseNotes:
• Improvement: the channel picker and browse view now correctly sort by the per-source channel order setting. In "Use provider channel order" mode, favorites are listed first, then provider order. In alphabetical mode, the full 6-tier sort (favorites / history / validated) is used.
• Fix: multi-source browse views with a mix of provider and alphabetical sources now sort each source correctly according to its own setting, and the channel picker respects this per-source sort mode.
